sections.heading: Contact360 Cross-Frontend Design System
sections.prose:
> **Source of truth**: `docs/frontend/design-tokens/c360-tokens.css`
> **Dashboard UI kit reference**: `docs/frontend/ideas/Dashboard ui kit/`
> **Last updated**: Era 2–4 implementation (Apr 2026)

---

sections.heading: Overview
sections.prose:
All four frontend surfaces share a single canonical `--c360-*` CSS custom-property system. Each surface implements or aliases these tokens in its own way, but the values must always match the canonical reference file.

| Surface | Stack | Token file |
|---------|-------|------------|
| `contact360.io/app` | Next.js + custom CSS | `app/css/core.css` |
| `contact360.io/email` | Next.js + Tailwind v4 + Radix UI | `src/app/globals.css` |
| `contact360.io/root` | Next.js + custom CSS (3D kit) | `src/styles/themes/variables.css` |
| `contact360.io/admin` | Django + static CSS | `static/admin/css/design-tokens.css` |

---

sections.heading: Design Tokens
sections.prose:
All tokens live in the canonical reference file. Surfaces MUST NOT define tokens not in the reference. They may add surface-specific aliases (e.g. `--marketing-primary`) but must point at `--c360-*` values.

```
docs/frontend/design-tokens/c360-tokens.css   ← canonical reference (DO NOT @import)
```

sections.heading: Key Token Groups
sections.prose:
| Group | Token prefix | Example |
|-------|-------------|---------|
| Brand | `--c360-primary`, `--c360-accent` | `#2f4cdd`, `#b519ec` |
| Semantic | `--c360-success/warning/danger/info` | `#2bc155` |
| Surfaces | `--c360-bg`, `--c360-bg-elevated`, `--c360-bg-secondary` | |
| Text | `--c360-text`, `--c360-text-muted`, `--c360-text-light` | |
| Borders | `--c360-border`, `--c360-border-strong` | |
| Typography | `--c360-font-primary` (Poppins), `--c360-font-secondary` (Nunito) | |
| Spacing | `--c360-spacing-1` … `--c360-spacing-16` | 4px … 64px |
| Radius | `--c360-radius-sm` … `--c360-radius-full` | 6px … 9999px |
| Shadows | `--c360-shadow-card`, `--c360-shadow-sm` … `--c360-shadow-xl` | |
| Z-index | `--c360-z-sidebar` … `--c360-z-toast` | 40 … 200 |
| Heights | `--c360-input-height`, `--c360-button-height` (+sm/lg) | 40px |

sections.heading: Navigation Shell
sections.prose:
Kit reference: `page-app-layout.html`

| Surface | Sidebar file | Active color |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| app | `app/css/layout.css` → `.c360-sidebar` | `--c360-primary` active indicator |
| email | `src/components/ui/sidebar.tsx` (shadcn Sidebar) | `--sidebar-accent: var(--c360-primary-light)` |
| root | `src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx` | `--c360-primary` for links |
| admin | `static/admin/css/layout.css` (geometry, flyout tokens) + `static/admin/css/components/shell-eatio.css` (topbar + nav tree) | `.nav-leaf.active` / collapsed rail use `--c360-primary` |

sections.heading: Admin shell (parity with app dashboard)
sections.prose:
- **DOM**: `templates/base.html` — no separate top strip; brand lives in `partials/sidebar.html` (`#admin-sidebar-nav`). Top bar is `partials/header.html` (menu | breadcrumb | search | actions).
- **Sidebar**: `.dlabnav` is fixed, full viewport height (`top: 0`, `height: 100vh`), width `--sidebar-width` (aliased to `--c360-sidebar-width`, 240px). Collapsed width `--sidebar-collapsed-width` → `--c360-sidebar-width-collapsed` (80px).
- **Top bar**: `.header` is fixed with `left` matching sidebar width; `body.nav-header-open` shifts `left` to the collapsed width (desktop). Main content uses `padding-top: var(--c360-topbar-height)` (64px).
- **Collapse**: `body.nav-header-open` = narrow rail on **desktop** (`min-width: 1024px`). Persisted in `localStorage` key **`c360-sidebar-collapsed`** (`"true"` / removed). Toggle: `#headerSidebarToggle` in `static/admin/js/app.js`.
- **Mobile** (`max-width: 1023px`): `body.sidebar-open` slides the drawer; `.sidebar-overlay` closes on tap; top bar spans full width (`left: 0`). Accordion submenus stay in-sidebar (no flyouts).
- **Collapsed nested nav**: `static/admin/js/sidebar-collapsed-flyout.js` builds `.c360-admin-flyout` panels from `.nav-submenu` (primary column + secondary column for nested branches). Styles: `.c360-admin-flyout*` in `layout.css`.

---

items.text: **DOM**: `templates/base.html` — no separate top strip; brand lives in `partials/sidebar.html` (`#admin-sidebar-nav`). Top bar is `partials/header.html` (menu | breadcrumb | search | actions).

**Sidebar**: `.dlabnav` is fixed, full viewport height (`top: 0`, `height: 100vh`), width `--sidebar-width` (aliased to `--c360-sidebar-width`, 240px). Collapsed width `--sidebar-collapsed-width` → `--c360-sidebar-width-collapsed` (80px).

**Top bar**: `.header` is fixed with `left` matching sidebar width; `body.nav-header-open` shifts `left` to the collapsed width (desktop). Main content uses `padding-top: var(--c360-topbar-height)` (64px).

**Collapse**: `body.nav-header-open` = narrow rail on **desktop** (`min-width: 1024px`). Persisted in `localStorage` key **`c360-sidebar-collapsed`** (`"true"` / removed). Toggle: `#headerSidebarToggle` in `static/admin/js/app.js`.
**Mobile** (`max-width: 1023px`): `body.sidebar-open` slides the drawer; `.sidebar-overlay` closes on tap; top bar spans full width (`left: 0`). Accordion submenus stay in-sidebar (no flyouts).

**Collapsed nested nav**: `static/admin/js/sidebar-collapsed-flyout.js` builds `.c360-admin-flyout` panels from `.nav-submenu` (primary column + secondary column for nested branches). Styles: `.c360-admin-flyout*` in `layout.css`.

sections.heading: Error Pages
sections.prose:
Kit reference: `page-error-404.html`, `page-error-500.html`

| Surface | File(s) |
|---------|---------|
| app | `app/not-found.tsx`, `app/error.tsx` (uses `c360-error-page` CSS classes) |
| email | `src/app/not-found.tsx`, `src/app/error.tsx` (inline `--c360-*` vars) |
| root | `app/not-found.tsx`, `app/error.tsx` (3D card style via `ErrorBoundaryFallback`) |
| admin | `templates/404.html`, `templates/403.html`, `templates/500.html` (standalone pages with design-tokens.css) |

---

sections.heading: Charts
sections.prose:
| Surface | Library | Config file |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| app | Recharts | `src/lib/chartTheme.ts` (`CHART_COLORS` / `RECHARTS_DEFAULTS`) |
| email | (no charts) | — |
| root | — | — |
| admin | Chart.js | `static/admin/js/charts.js` (`c360Var()` reads CSS tokens at runtime) |

Chart primary series: `--c360-primary` (#2f4cdd). Second series: `--c360-accent` (#b519ec).

sections.heading: Email Compose Workflow
sections.prose:
| Surface | File |
|---------|------|
| email | `src/components/compose-dialog.tsx` — floating compose panel (Gmail-style) |
| email | `src/components/email-list.tsx` — Compose button triggers dialog |

Send endpoint: `POST /api/emails/send` via `mailhubFetch`.

sections.heading: Typography
sections.prose:
| Font | Weight | Usage | Loading method |
|------|--------|-------|----------------|
| Poppins | 400, 500, 600, 700 | Headings, labels | `next/font/google` (app/email/root), `<link>` (admin) |
| Nunito | 400, 600 | Body, subtle text | same as above |

Tokens: `--c360-font-primary` (Poppins), `--c360-font-secondary` (Nunito), `--c360-font-mono` (Fira Code).

---

sections.heading: CSS Audit Scripts
sections.prose:
| Surface | Script | Command |
|---------|--------|---------|
| app | `scripts/css-inventory.mjs` | `npm run css:inventory` |
| app | `scripts/check-best-practices.mjs` | `npm run check:best-practices` |
| email | `scripts/css-token-audit.mjs` | `npm run css:audit` |
| root | `scripts/css-token-audit.mjs` | `npm run css:audit` |
| admin | (Django collectstatic CI check) | — |

---

sections.heading: Dark Mode
sections.prose:
| Surface | Mechanism |
|---------|-----------|
| app | `[data-theme="dark"]` on `<html>` |
| email | `.dark` class (Tailwind dark mode) + `--c360-*` overrides in `globals.css` |
| root | `[data-theme="dark"]` via ThemeProvider |
| admin | `body.dark` class applied by JS toggle |

The canonical token file defines both `:root` (light) and `[data-theme="dark"], body.dark` overrides for all `--c360-*` values.
